type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The previous estimates were based on an internal spreadsheet with the applicable emissions factors for each substance and facility. The current estimates are based on emissions factors configured within NRM’s new emissions management software, Envirosoft. As the methodology change affects each substance and each piece of equipment, specifically outlining the change for each entry in a meaningful manner is difficult. We can provide a spreadsheet with previous factors and current factors by facility upon request (or if there is a location to append an attachment prior to submitting we will attach it there).
